creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, thanks!  Minor changes: 
- PKGNAME to lower case 
- Edit files/Makeflags and add patches/patch-ac to honor CXX/CFLAGS 

I was not able to observe a problem with pkg_add regarding the filenames 
with spaces.  I did a "make package" and then installed it using pkg_add, 
and the files were added intact.  If I am missing the problem, please 
clarify and I will mark it NO_PACKAGE until Jordan fixes pkg_add. :-)
